title: How to watch Galaxy Unpacked 2026 live — start times and possible announcements for Samsung’s big July showcase
summary: On the phones side, it’s likely to all be foldables, with the Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 8, Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8, and Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra all rumored to be making an appearance.
